text:

      "It is an outdoor mural."

    "HasA": [
      "It has two exterior walls."
    ],

      "It is characterized by bold geometric shapes of bright colors.",
      "It is characterized by mostly reds, yellows, and oranges with pops of blue, black, and white intermixed.",
      "It is characterized by curved rectangular forms that morph together to create color-blocked waves that cross the wall.",
      "It is characterized by larger curved shapes made from smaller rectangles, triangles and trapezoids."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for the beautification of downtown Indianapolis."
    ],

      "It is located at 32 North Delaware Street in downtown Indianapolis, Indiana.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それは屋外の壁画です。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは2つの外壁を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは大胆でアースカラーの長方形、扇形、四分円、S字カーブの複雑なパズルによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは大胆な幾何学的形状と明るい色によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは主に赤、黄色、オレンジ色で、青、黒、白が混ざっています。",
      "それは壁を横切るカラーブロックの波を作り出すために変形する湾曲した長方形の形状によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはより大きな湾曲した形状がより小さな長方形、三角形、台形から作られていることによって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはインディアナポリスのダウンタウンの美化のために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それはインディアナ州インディアナポリスのダウンタウン、ノースデラウェアストリート32番地にあります。",
      "それは4階建ての2つの商業ビルの2つの外壁にあります。"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "それは1973年に建てられました。"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "それはローランド・ホバートによって建てられました。"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [

    ],
    "CreatedIn": [
      "それはインディアナ州インディアナポリスで作成されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [

    "Affects": [

    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それは長方形、扇形、四分円、S字カーブで構成されています。",
      "それは大胆な幾何学的形状で構成されています。",
      "それは明るい色で構成されています。",
      "それは湾曲した長方形の形状で構成されています。",
      "それはカラーブロックの波で構成されています。",
      "それはより小さな長方形、三角形、台形で構成されています。"
    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "それはインディアナポリス・アーバン・ウォールズ・プロジェクトの一部です。",
      "それは都市全体にアーバン・ウォールズを制作する継続的な取り組みの一部です。"

      "それは幾何学的形状と明るい色で知られています。",
      "それは市が後援した最初の壁画として知られています。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはインディアナポリス・アーバン・ウォールズ・プロジェクトと関連があります。",
      "それはインディアナポリス公園レクリエーション局と関連があります。",
      "それは1970年代の郊外への人口流出と関連があります。",
      "それはアメリカン・フレッチャー・ナショナル銀行と関連があります。",

      "それは1970年代の郊外への人口流出によって影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それは1970年代の郊外への人口流出の間にダウンタウンへの関心を引き戻すことに影響を与えました。",
      "それはインディアナポリスのダウンタウンの美化に影響を与えました。",
      "それは屋外の壁画デザインの開発に影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }

HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a complex puzzle of rectangles, pie-shaped wedges, quarter arcs and S curves in bold but earthy colors.
It is characterized by bold geometric shapes of bright colors.
It is characterized by mostly reds, yellows, and oranges with pops of blue, black, and white intermixed.
It is characterized by curved rectangular forms that morph together to create color-blocked waves that cross the wall.
It is characterized by larger curved shapes made from smaller rectangles, triangles and trapezoids.
UsedFor: It is used for the beautification of downtown Indianapolis.
LocatedIn: It is located at 32 North Delaware Street in downtown Indianapolis, Indiana.
It is located on two exterior walls of two four-story commercial buildings.
BuiltBy: It was built by Roland Hobart.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the Indianapolis Urban Walls Project.
CreatedBy: It was created by Austrian artist Roland Hobart.
CreatedIn: It was created in Indianapolis, Indiana.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by Naegele Outdoor Advertising.
ConsistsOf: It consists of rectangles, pie-shaped wedges, quarter arcs and S curves.
It consists of bold geometric shapes.
It consists of curved rectangular forms.
It consists of smaller rectangles, triangles and trapezoids.
PartOf: It is part of the Indianapolis Urban Walls Project.
It is part of an ongoing effort to produce Urban Walls throughout the city.
KnownFor: It is known for being a complex puzzle of shapes in bold colors.
It is known for its geometric shapes and bright colors.
It is known for being the first mural sponsored by the city.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Indianapolis Urban Walls Project.
It is associated with the Indianapolis Department of Parks and Recreation.
It is associated with the 1970s suburban flight.
It is associated with the American Fletcher National Bank.
It is associated with the National Endowment for the Arts.
It is associated with Deputy Mayor Michael DeFabis.
It is associated with Naegele Outdoor Advertising.
It is associated with Richard Lugar.
It is associated with Steven R. Skirvin.
It is associated with Thomas A. Moyahan.
It is associated with the Indiana Parking Company.
It is associated with the Union Title Building.
It is associated with the Indiana Parking Garage Association.
It is associated with Crown Barrister, LLC.
It is associated with Richard L. Brown Jr.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the fall of 1973.
WonBy: It was won by Roland Hobart.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the 1970s suburban flight.
Influenced: It influenced interest back downtown during the 1970s suburban flight.
It influenced the beautification of downtown Indianapolis.
It influenced the development of outdoor mural designs.
